headers.value: default-src *; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://www.gstatic.com https://www.google.com https://unpkg.com; connect-src *; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://unpkg.com; img-src * data:; frame-src https://www.google.com; font-src 'self' data:; worker-src 'self' blob:;
